hero.title: Routines
hero.subtitle: Pick one area. Get a few concrete next steps.

picker.groupHint: Shows the areas in this group.

recommend.off: Routine suggestions are off for this account, so your saved pieces stay private.
recommend.ctaHint: Reads your saved pieces and drafts a few suggestions.
recommend.empty: Nothing usable came back. Try again, or pick another area.
recommend.error: The suggestion run didn't finish. Your pieces are safe. Try again.
recommend.limit: Today's free suggestions are used up. They reset tomorrow.
recommend.disclaimerBody: Ideas and plans, not professional advice.

card.saveRoutineA11y: Save this step as a managed routine
card.addDeviceHint: Opens your device calendar form with this item prefilled.
card.addGoogleHint: Opens Google Calendar with this event prefilled.
card.downloadIcsHint: Downloads an .ics file that opens in your calendar app.
card.shareListHint: Opens the share sheet with this checklist as text.
card.remindHint: Schedules an on-device reminder at this item's time.

consent.title: Hand items to your apps?
consent.body: Approved items go to your calendar or share sheet. Asked once: keep allowing from now on, and turn it off anytime in Privacy.
consent.agreeHint: Saves the choice and performs this push.
consent.laterHint: Closes without pushing. The item stays on this screen.

today.heading: Today's routines
today.empty: No routines due today. Save a step below to start one.

states.emptyDomain: Pick an area above to get started.

push.deniedNote: Calendar permission is off. Allow it in your device settings to use this.
push.reminderDeniedNote: Notification permission is off. Allow it in your device settings to use reminders.
push.reminderFailedNote: The reminder could not be set. Check the item's time and try again.
push.reminderUnavailableNote: Saved. Reminders need the installed app, so this one won't ring here.

health.autoCompletedHint: A logged workout or steps over your goal ticked this off.

focus.title: Focus timer
focus.tip: Finishing a focus block checks off your daily focus routine.
focus.alarmFocusBody: Nice work. Time for a short break.
focus.alarmBreakBody: Back to your next focus block.

srs.title: Language review
srs.tip: Clearing today's due cards checks off your language routine.
